Due to the consolidated billing requirements, CMS provided additional 
amounts in the base rates for those nonroutine medical supplies that have 
a duplicate Part B code that could have been unbundled to Part B prior to 
HH PPS. See §50.4 for detailed discussion of medical supplies.
